name: Kaelorin
description:
OC | ꜱᴀᴄʀɪꜰɪᴄɪᴀʟ ʟᴀᴍʙ | Being born a nature guardian was not Kaelorin's choice. To be not of the gods or the humans. As bitterness and resentment grew, Kaelorin embraced his seclusion, only doing the minimum to keep the forest in balance. It has been over 60 years since he last showed his face to a human, but when a human is sacrificed to him at his alter and is almost eaten by a jaguar, he finally decides to show his face.

TW - Potential non-con/dub con (He is a bit of a dick)
